item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: -png2svgz- Icon Theme builder for Plasma 5/6 [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: -png2svgz- Icon Theme builder for Plasma 5/6 [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: Blackcrack
item.itunes:summary:
-png2svgz- Icon Theme builder for Plasma 5/6
(Developers Apps)
2024.05.21-14-36 update the code
2024.05.02-09-00 update the code



The pictures, svg or svgz is in the header adjustable,
the name is only png2svgz because i have started to scripting with this name
and there have i search for a png2svg.sh, i did not know to be a png moved into a svg..
and the name it is easy png2svgz.sh, it is possible for make also svg .. at first/at the codingstart...
later maybe easy let copy into the themefolder as png's because the Trinity-WindowsManager what i think about it
it's a bash-script, check it out before you ask ! ;)

Also the whole configuration of the Script is into the head of the Single Script,
also Rename of the Script is possible because it's all based on $0 !

* also be sub-folder "svg" for fully build up real "svg"-Pictures be possible now in the "svg"-Subfolder in the Source-sub-folder's
what is overcopy the png-svg behind the 1st "moveinsvg-routine" and put/copy all the svg's in the "working" Theme folder and overwrite the "old files,
this helps to check, if all SVG are complet ... also exist a possible for compile all for let check the "themefolder" before you let compress and finishing the themepackage, also it is possible if you sure to be all fixed , can you push it via "makeall" include compressing theme package, check out --help or /? of the script,
Also with "soft links" can you now working, as example to save picture-space in Size, as example *-symbolic.svg or some in svg-folder can you set up a softlink and it will copy it to the Product-folder also as link
and it is adjustable in the Configuration in the head of the Script "cplnsvg=yes" so, "copy the linked svg" 's, if 0 or no, will copy the fully picture and make therewith real svg's out of the copy of the linked file and make all more bigger in size at end.. (thy for the info Nate in your Blog ( https://pointieststick.com/feed/ ) super suggestion to use softlinks ! )

All is description in the help. So, have fun and happy Theme creating include SVG-files as 2nd over copy step !!

So can you make now a fully real SVG-Picture Theme .. (and not only a png-copy-in svgfiles)

also exist 8x8, 16x16, 22x22, 32x32, 48x48, 64x64, 96x96, 128x128, 256x256, 512x512,8x8@2, 16x16@2, 22x22@2, 32x32@2,48x48@2
real folder support in the "endproduct-folder" for put special pictures in each single folder and will also not overwrite and not deleted,
because be real Folders and no more links if you create one of these folders for special pictures in these resolutions ..


Best

[font=arial,helvetica,sans-serif][size=6]The [b]png2svgz.sh[/b][/size][/font] (started with an small script and not renamed)

Icontheme Folder & Skelett and Themplates creator/builder who works together with inkscape for move the png's into svg's and gziped as svgz later
for KDE44 and Plasma. This is a kde44^/Plasma icontheme creator helper and helps you to create a Plasmatheme into Konsole of Plasma and, you can use Konquerer with 2 Window for the sourcefolder and the themefolder actions, to see left down below by move the png's into svg's, later can you configure it to make gz compressed svga's so svgz, if you configure it.. works gzip alone as routine and works really fast to make the whole into svgz.. pv it is support too by compressing the theme, if you have installed

png2svg.sh supports "--help|help|/?|?|about|--about"

the whole need Plasma, konsole or xterm, it's a clean bash-script, you can work with it also in terminals like ssh, but you must have for Inkscape a Surface like Plasma/KDE or Gnome and a Filemanager to view in 2 different window what's going on.

it works also over nfs :)

compressing the whole needs only an terminal/ssh connection, it meant therewith,
you can create a png and move it into your source directory for later working,
or, you have a svg file and move it directly in the theme-folder where it is later compressing.
(but make a backup of them, because if you works later and let all again convert from
png to svg, will be all first delete in the theme/apps (not in source !) or other folder in your themefolder,
so can you put it later in the right folder of source/apps and have it then save..
or you move both in the right folder once, the png in
the source/apps/example.png and the other in theme/apps/example.svg

compressing the whole it's possible 0v35 network, it means terminal/ssh
because the compressing works directly in the terminal and support pv and esc colors ;)

at moment do it [strike]only create the Mimetypes[/strike] nope, now also other files, the other pictures have you to create as png's in the sourceforlder.
May do i add the whole standard plasma files as themplatefiles too , what i have now ..
(themplates, files who have no Pictures on it and be transparent, this is the reason why do you only see square something, edit this file and set a Picture in it
or remove the themplate with an other png with the same name ),
as example folders and systemsettings icons, but at moment must you it do.
(or you take other Iconthemes and use this files and make more out of this..)

If you have this, help this script to move all in the right folder as svg later as svgz with gzip and create a index.desktop before/by compress .

so:

it creates in your Homefolder
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/source
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/scaled
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/%generate index.desktop% by compress out of the variables in the setup (first couple lines of the script).

check out the help of the file ( /? or --help)

so, have fun :)

best regards
Blacky
[read more]
item.description:
-png2svgz- Icon Theme builder for Plasma 5/6
(Developers Apps)
2024.05.21-14-36 update the code
2024.05.02-09-00 update the code



The pictures, svg or svgz is in the header adjustable,
the name is only png2svgz because i have started to scripting with this name
and there have i search for a png2svg.sh, i did not know to be a png moved into a svg..
and the name it is easy png2svgz.sh, it is possible for make also svg .. at first/at the codingstart...
later maybe easy let copy into the themefolder as png's because the Trinity-WindowsManager what i think about it
it's a bash-script, check it out before you ask ! ;)

Also the whole configuration of the Script is into the head of the Single Script,
also Rename of the Script is possible because it's all based on $0 !

* also be sub-folder "svg" for fully build up real "svg"-Pictures be possible now in the "svg"-Subfolder in the Source-sub-folder's
what is overcopy the png-svg behind the 1st "moveinsvg-routine" and put/copy all the svg's in the "working" Theme folder and overwrite the "old files,
this helps to check, if all SVG are complet ... also exist a possible for compile all for let check the "themefolder" before you let compress and finishing the themepackage, also it is possible if you sure to be all fixed , can you push it via "makeall" include compressing theme package, check out --help or /? of the script,
Also with "soft links" can you now working, as example to save picture-space in Size, as example *-symbolic.svg or some in svg-folder can you set up a softlink and it will copy it to the Product-folder also as link
and it is adjustable in the Configuration in the head of the Script "cplnsvg=yes" so, "copy the linked svg" 's, if 0 or no, will copy the fully picture and make therewith real svg's out of the copy of the linked file and make all more bigger in size at end.. (thy for the info Nate in your Blog ( https://pointieststick.com/feed/ ) super suggestion to use softlinks ! )

All is description in the help. So, have fun and happy Theme creating include SVG-files as 2nd over copy step !!

So can you make now a fully real SVG-Picture Theme .. (and not only a png-copy-in svgfiles)

also exist 8x8, 16x16, 22x22, 32x32, 48x48, 64x64, 96x96, 128x128, 256x256, 512x512,8x8@2, 16x16@2, 22x22@2, 32x32@2,48x48@2
real folder support in the "endproduct-folder" for put special pictures in each single folder and will also not overwrite and not deleted,
because be real Folders and no more links if you create one of these folders for special pictures in these resolutions ..


Best

[font=arial,helvetica,sans-serif][size=6]The [b]png2svgz.sh[/b][/size][/font] (started with an small script and not renamed)

Icontheme Folder & Skelett and Themplates creator/builder who works together with inkscape for move the png's into svg's and gziped as svgz later
for KDE44 and Plasma. This is a kde44^/Plasma icontheme creator helper and helps you to create a Plasmatheme into Konsole of Plasma and, you can use Konquerer with 2 Window for the sourcefolder and the themefolder actions, to see left down below by move the png's into svg's, later can you configure it to make gz compressed svga's so svgz, if you configure it.. works gzip alone as routine and works really fast to make the whole into svgz.. pv it is support too by compressing the theme, if you have installed

png2svg.sh supports "--help|help|/?|?|about|--about"

the whole need Plasma, konsole or xterm, it's a clean bash-script, you can work with it also in terminals like ssh, but you must have for Inkscape a Surface like Plasma/KDE or Gnome and a Filemanager to view in 2 different window what's going on.

it works also over nfs :)

compressing the whole needs only an terminal/ssh connection, it meant therewith,
you can create a png and move it into your source directory for later working,
or, you have a svg file and move it directly in the theme-folder where it is later compressing.
(but make a backup of them, because if you works later and let all again convert from
png to svg, will be all first delete in the theme/apps (not in source !) or other folder in your themefolder,
so can you put it later in the right folder of source/apps and have it then save..
or you move both in the right folder once, the png in
the source/apps/example.png and the other in theme/apps/example.svg

compressing the whole it's possible 0v35 network, it means terminal/ssh
because the compressing works directly in the terminal and support pv and esc colors ;)

at moment do it [strike]only create the Mimetypes[/strike] nope, now also other files, the other pictures have you to create as png's in the sourceforlder.
May do i add the whole standard plasma files as themplatefiles too , what i have now ..
(themplates, files who have no Pictures on it and be transparent, this is the reason why do you only see square something, edit this file and set a Picture in it
or remove the themplate with an other png with the same name ),
as example folders and systemsettings icons, but at moment must you it do.
(or you take other Iconthemes and use this files and make more out of this..)

If you have this, help this script to move all in the right folder as svg later as svgz with gzip and create a index.desktop before/by compress .

so:

it creates in your Homefolder
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/source
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/scaled
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/%generate index.desktop% by compress out of the variables in the setup (first couple lines of the script).

check out the help of the file ( /? or --help)

so, have fun :)

best regards
Blacky
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
-png2svgz- Icon Theme builder for Plasma 5/6
(Developers Apps)
2024.05.21-14-36 update the code
2024.05.02-09-00 update the code



The pictures, svg or svgz is in the header adjustable,
the name is only png2svgz because i have started to scripting with this name
and there have i search for a png2svg.sh, i did not know to be a png moved into a svg..
and the name it is easy png2svgz.sh, it is possible for make also svg .. at first/at the codingstart...
later maybe easy let copy into the themefolder as png's because the Trinity-WindowsManager what i think about it
it's a bash-script, check it out before you ask ! ;)

Also the whole configuration of the Script is into the head of the Single Script,
also Rename of the Script is possible because it's all based on $0 !

* also be sub-folder "svg" for fully build up real "svg"-Pictures be possible now in the "svg"-Subfolder in the Source-sub-folder's
what is overcopy the png-svg behind the 1st "moveinsvg-routine" and put/copy all the svg's in the "working" Theme folder and overwrite the "old files,
this helps to check, if all SVG are complet ... also exist a possible for compile all for let check the "themefolder" before you let compress and finishing the themepackage, also it is possible if you sure to be all fixed , can you push it via "makeall" include compressing theme package, check out --help or /? of the script,
Also with "soft links" can you now working, as example to save picture-space in Size, as example *-symbolic.svg or some in svg-folder can you set up a softlink and it will copy it to the Product-folder also as link
and it is adjustable in the Configuration in the head of the Script "cplnsvg=yes" so, "copy the linked svg" 's, if 0 or no, will copy the fully picture and make therewith real svg's out of the copy of the linked file and make all more bigger in size at end.. (thy for the info Nate in your Blog ( https://pointieststick.com/feed/ ) super suggestion to use softlinks ! )

All is description in the help. So, have fun and happy Theme creating include SVG-files as 2nd over copy step !!

So can you make now a fully real SVG-Picture Theme .. (and not only a png-copy-in svgfiles)

also exist 8x8, 16x16, 22x22, 32x32, 48x48, 64x64, 96x96, 128x128, 256x256, 512x512,8x8@2, 16x16@2, 22x22@2, 32x32@2,48x48@2
real folder support in the "endproduct-folder" for put special pictures in each single folder and will also not overwrite and not deleted,
because be real Folders and no more links if you create one of these folders for special pictures in these resolutions ..


Best

[font=arial,helvetica,sans-serif][size=6]The [b]png2svgz.sh[/b][/size][/font] (started with an small script and not renamed)

Icontheme Folder & Skelett and Themplates creator/builder who works together with inkscape for move the png's into svg's and gziped as svgz later
for KDE44 and Plasma. This is a kde44^/Plasma icontheme creator helper and helps you to create a Plasmatheme into Konsole of Plasma and, you can use Konquerer with 2 Window for the sourcefolder and the themefolder actions, to see left down below by move the png's into svg's, later can you configure it to make gz compressed svga's so svgz, if you configure it.. works gzip alone as routine and works really fast to make the whole into svgz.. pv it is support too by compressing the theme, if you have installed

png2svg.sh supports "--help|help|/?|?|about|--about"

the whole need Plasma, konsole or xterm, it's a clean bash-script, you can work with it also in terminals like ssh, but you must have for Inkscape a Surface like Plasma/KDE or Gnome and a Filemanager to view in 2 different window what's going on.

it works also over nfs :)

compressing the whole needs only an terminal/ssh connection, it meant therewith,
you can create a png and move it into your source directory for later working,
or, you have a svg file and move it directly in the theme-folder where it is later compressing.
(but make a backup of them, because if you works later and let all again convert from
png to svg, will be all first delete in the theme/apps (not in source !) or other folder in your themefolder,
so can you put it later in the right folder of source/apps and have it then save..
or you move both in the right folder once, the png in
the source/apps/example.png and the other in theme/apps/example.svg

compressing the whole it's possible 0v35 network, it means terminal/ssh
because the compressing works directly in the terminal and support pv and esc colors ;)

at moment do it [strike]only create the Mimetypes[/strike] nope, now also other files, the other pictures have you to create as png's in the sourceforlder.
May do i add the whole standard plasma files as themplatefiles too , what i have now ..
(themplates, files who have no Pictures on it and be transparent, this is the reason why do you only see square something, edit this file and set a Picture in it
or remove the themplate with an other png with the same name ),
as example folders and systemsettings icons, but at moment must you it do.
(or you take other Iconthemes and use this files and make more out of this..)

If you have this, help this script to move all in the right folder as svg later as svgz with gzip and create a index.desktop before/by compress .

so:

it creates in your Homefolder
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/source
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/scaled
$HOME/yourthemeworkplacename/Youtthemename/%generate index.desktop% by compress out of the variables in the setup (first couple lines of the script).

check out the help of the file ( /? or --help)

so, have fun :)

best regards
Blacky
[read more]

item.title: Allusion [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Allusion [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Allusion
(Utilities)
Allusion is a tool built for artists, aimed to help you organize your Visual Library – A single place that contains your entire collection of references, inspiration and any other kinds of images.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer
[read more]
item.description:
Allusion
(Utilities)
Allusion is a tool built for artists, aimed to help you organize your Visual Library – A single place that contains your entire collection of references, inspiration and any other kinds of images.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Allusion
(Utilities)
Allusion is a tool built for artists, aimed to help you organize your Visual Library – A single place that contains your entire collection of references, inspiration and any other kinds of images.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer
[read more]

item.title: claudemods-pyqt6terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: claudemods-pyqt6terminal [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
claudemods-pyqt6terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.10
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any distro qt6 installed
i completly remain the application now in qt6 cpp
files have been updated

simply extract
open konsole in the directory with .cpp and .h files
enter qmake6 -makefile
then enter make
execute the claudemods-qt6terminal-v2.0.10 executable

since i make linux distributions
originally i made this as an update for my system app
but i remove my extras and uploaded it for others to use also
ofcourse i have my own custom version for my distributions also
but i will try make this more functional and universal
perhaps add some extra functions to make it more unique

currently you can
check bash history
change the terminal theme



[read more]
item.description:
claudemods-pyqt6terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.10
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any distro qt6 installed
i completly remain the application now in qt6 cpp
files have been updated

simply extract
open konsole in the directory with .cpp and .h files
enter qmake6 -makefile
then enter make
execute the claudemods-qt6terminal-v2.0.10 executable

since i make linux distributions
originally i made this as an update for my system app
but i remove my extras and uploaded it for others to use also
ofcourse i have my own custom version for my distributions also
but i will try make this more functional and universal
perhaps add some extra functions to make it more unique

currently you can
check bash history
change the terminal theme



[read more]
item.content:encoded:
claudemods-pyqt6terminal
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.10
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any distro qt6 installed
i completly remain the application now in qt6 cpp
files have been updated

simply extract
open konsole in the directory with .cpp and .h files
enter qmake6 -makefile
then enter make
execute the claudemods-qt6terminal-v2.0.10 executable

since i make linux distributions
originally i made this as an update for my system app
but i remove my extras and uploaded it for others to use also
ofcourse i have my own custom version for my distributions also
but i will try make this more functional and universal
perhaps add some extra functions to make it more unique

currently you can
check bash history
change the terminal theme



[read more]

item.title: claudemods-gpudrivers [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: claudemods-gpudrivers [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
claudemods-gpudrivers
(Utilities)
claudemods-gpudrivers v1.03
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any arch distro with pyqt6 installed

v1.03+
fixes for commands
appimage update
now the gpudrivers installer is an appimage
you will need to download the .zip needed
and to uncompress into /opt

currently you can install
intel drivers
amd drivers
and default nvidia packages

i want to add options for nvidia versions
this should be in the next version


to use the application just run the .bin file

if you would like to use the application
as a system application e.g from application menu
copy the folder to /opt
and copy the .desktop to your applications directory e.g usr/share/applications


[read more]
item.description:
claudemods-gpudrivers
(Utilities)
claudemods-gpudrivers v1.03
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any arch distro with pyqt6 installed

v1.03+
fixes for commands
appimage update
now the gpudrivers installer is an appimage
you will need to download the .zip needed
and to uncompress into /opt

currently you can install
intel drivers
amd drivers
and default nvidia packages

i want to add options for nvidia versions
this should be in the next version


to use the application just run the .bin file

if you would like to use the application
as a system application e.g from application menu
copy the folder to /opt
and copy the .desktop to your applications directory e.g usr/share/applications


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
claudemods-gpudrivers
(Utilities)
claudemods-gpudrivers v1.03
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any arch distro with pyqt6 installed

v1.03+
fixes for commands
appimage update
now the gpudrivers installer is an appimage
you will need to download the .zip needed
and to uncompress into /opt

currently you can install
intel drivers
amd drivers
and default nvidia packages

i want to add options for nvidia versions
this should be in the next version


to use the application just run the .bin file

if you would like to use the application
as a system application e.g from application menu
copy the folder to /opt
and copy the .desktop to your applications directory e.g usr/share/applications


[read more]

item.title: claudemods-dnsmanager [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: claudemods-dnsmanager [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
claudemods-dnsmanager
(Internet Apps)
claudemods-dnsmanager v1.04
this is a qt6 appimage
this is has been tested on arch plasma 6.1.4

you can either just run the appimage by downloading it
and making it executable
or use the app as a dolphin service menu on plasma 6
place the provided files into /home/$USER/.local/share/kio/servicemenus/

it uses networkmanager to change to selected dns server chosen
so you could try install pyqt6 with pip and run the provided .bin
i will try to make this more universal in next update

there are a few dns options to choose from
they all will have both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses by default
these are the options
Google Public
Cloudflare
OpenDNS
Quad9 secured


to use the application just run the .bin file
you will need to enter your sudo password
upon entering the application

if you would like to use the application
as a system application e.g from application menu
copy the folder to /opt
and copy the .desktop to your applications directory e.g usr/share/applications

v1.04++
new .desktop provided to use as dolphin service menu
place .desktop and appimage in /home/$USER/.local/share/kio/servicemenus/

v1.04
appimage update

v1.02 not Released yet things id like to add.....
add the name of the current dns being used
add the option to change the primary dns being used as current it only does secondary
add some more option of dns servers to change from

If you like what I'm doing and want to support me to improve, please consider donating.
Buy me a 🍕🥧 https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

[read more]
item.description:
claudemods-dnsmanager
(Internet Apps)
claudemods-dnsmanager v1.04
this is a qt6 appimage
this is has been tested on arch plasma 6.1.4

you can either just run the appimage by downloading it
and making it executable
or use the app as a dolphin service menu on plasma 6
place the provided files into /home/$USER/.local/share/kio/servicemenus/

it uses networkmanager to change to selected dns server chosen
so you could try install pyqt6 with pip and run the provided .bin
i will try to make this more universal in next update

there are a few dns options to choose from
they all will have both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses by default
these are the options
Google Public
Cloudflare
OpenDNS
Quad9 secured


to use the application just run the .bin file
you will need to enter your sudo password
upon entering the application

if you would like to use the application
as a system application e.g from application menu
copy the folder to /opt
and copy the .desktop to your applications directory e.g usr/share/applications

v1.04++
new .desktop provided to use as dolphin service menu
place .desktop and appimage in /home/$USER/.local/share/kio/servicemenus/

v1.04
appimage update

v1.02 not Released yet things id like to add.....
add the name of the current dns being used
add the option to change the primary dns being used as current it only does secondary
add some more option of dns servers to change from

If you like what I'm doing and want to support me to improve, please consider donating.
Buy me a 🍕🥧 https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
claudemods-dnsmanager
(Internet Apps)
claudemods-dnsmanager v1.04
this is a qt6 appimage
this is has been tested on arch plasma 6.1.4

you can either just run the appimage by downloading it
and making it executable
or use the app as a dolphin service menu on plasma 6
place the provided files into /home/$USER/.local/share/kio/servicemenus/

it uses networkmanager to change to selected dns server chosen
so you could try install pyqt6 with pip and run the provided .bin
i will try to make this more universal in next update

there are a few dns options to choose from
they all will have both IPv4 and IPv6 addresses by default
these are the options
Google Public
Cloudflare
OpenDNS
Quad9 secured


to use the application just run the .bin file
you will need to enter your sudo password
upon entering the application

if you would like to use the application
as a system application e.g from application menu
copy the folder to /opt
and copy the .desktop to your applications directory e.g usr/share/applications

v1.04++
new .desktop provided to use as dolphin service menu
place .desktop and appimage in /home/$USER/.local/share/kio/servicemenus/

v1.04
appimage update

v1.02 not Released yet things id like to add.....
add the name of the current dns being used
add the option to change the primary dns being used as current it only does secondary
add some more option of dns servers to change from

If you like what I'm doing and want to support me to improve, please consider donating.
Buy me a 🍕🥧 https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

[read more]

item.title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
mms support
MPRIS (1.0 and 2.0)
removable device detection (via HAL or UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics (using lyrics.wikia.com)
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC and WavPack)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
Last.fm/Libre.fm scrobbler
CDDB support
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
mms support
MPRIS (1.0 and 2.0)
removable device detection (via HAL or UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics (using lyrics.wikia.com)
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC and WavPack)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
Last.fm/Libre.fm scrobbler
CDDB support
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
mms support
MPRIS (1.0 and 2.0)
removable device detection (via HAL or UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics (using lyrics.wikia.com)
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC and WavPack)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
Last.fm/Libre.fm scrobbler
CDDB support
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]
